lints.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
lints.detail: Function `surveys.submit_response(p_survey_id uuid, p_answers jsonb)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/submit_response`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function

lints.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
lints.detail: Function `surveys.submit_response(p_survey_id uuid, p_answers jsonb)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/submit_response`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
lints.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
